## What this changes

Briefly describe the change and why.

Fixes #(issue number, if any)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests for this change)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies
- [ ] Public API changes have JSDoc + an `@example`
- [ ] For grammar/data changes: source cited (CLDR / ISO 4217 / Unicode / Umm al-Qura)
